info.title: CRM API
info.description: Tenant-isolated CRM and attendance platform API

employeeId.description: Employee to link atomically when the invited user accepts the invitation

legalHoldUntil.description: Optional legal-hold expiry. The purge cannot run before this timestamp.

policyId.description: Direct policy override. Use null to inherit department or tenant policy.

requestId.description: Client-generated idempotency key for safe retries

clientClockOffsetSeconds.description: Client clock minus trusted server clock

providerMethodRef.description: Token/reference returned by the provider SDK
